description_long: This seafood shop is part of a compact urban streetscape, featuring two main multi-story buildings with traditional Japanese architectural elements such as tiled, gabled roofs and wooden facades. The shop is surrounded by narrow streets, utility poles with overhead wires, and a small arched pedestrian bridge over a green-tinted waterway. Outdoor market stalls and benches are arranged along the sidewalks, some with awnings and tables displaying goods. The area is detailed with street furniture, bicycles, trash bins, and potted plants, creating a lively, lived-in atmosphere. The buildings have visible air conditioning units, signage, and windows, with the shop likely occupying the ground floor of one of the structures.
description: A traditional Japanese-style seafood shop set in a detailed urban street scene, with tiled roofs, market stalls, and a small arched bridge.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the shop's main street-facing side, with market stalls, benches, and the arched bridge most visible, along with overhead wires and signage.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the main building, the bridge, and a bicycle, with more of the street furniture and utility poles in view.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a rear perspective, showing the back of the buildings, a dumpster, and the continuation of the street layout.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side, revealing the layered rooftops, more benches, and the rear facades of the buildings.
attribute_storefront_signage: There are several rectangular signs with Japanese characters, primarily white with red and black text, mounted vertically and horizontally on the building facades. The signage appears to be made of painted wood or metal, with a traditional, understated style typical of small Japanese shops.
attribute_displayed_seafood: None. No clearly visible seafood is displayed in the outdoor market stalls or on tables in any of the views.
attribute_nautical_decorations: None. There are no visible nautical-themed decorations such as anchors, nets, or marine motifs present in the scene.
attribute_ice-filled_display_cases: None. There are no visible ice-filled display cases or similar seafood presentation features in the outdoor or indoor areas.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional Japanese urban vernacular, characterized by tiled gabled roofs, wooden facades, and compact multi-story structures with simple, functional detailing.
